title: store: alloc_diversifier_and_create_invoice does not check INSERT OR IGNORE rows_affected
description: In alloc_diversifier_and_create_invoice (store.rs ~line 1343), after the Phase 2 re-read passes and the diversifier is advanced, the invoice is inserted with INSERT OR IGNORE. If a duplicate invoice_id is supplied (collision with a prior row), rows_affected == 0 and the function returns Ok(Some(address)) — telling the caller that a new invoice was created while actually nothing was inserted. The diversifier was already advanced irreversibly. Compare to count_and_create_invoice (line 1210) which correctly errors on rows_affected == 0. Trigger: caller passes a duplicate invoice_id (e.g. deterministic UUID derived from user pubkey without sufficient entropy).
